## [00:00 - 03:00]

So the first question I get before we hop into the gear that you want is what's better face to camera or slide presentation? And my response is always, it doesn't actually matter. I'm actually a fan of both. You'll notice that in most of my videos I'll use face to camera, but then I'll slice in images and I'm a big fan of slide presentation as well. Doesn't require you to do anything other than create slide decks that are interesting and then talk over them while recording your computer screen and audio from a microphone that's plugged into your computer. And that is a perfect segue into video editing software. So when you have your content, content is king. The audience does not care about how you made the video.
